name: @forgeax/bevy-easing
description: Reproduction of Bevy's `animation/easing_functions` example (eased vs linear motion) — a MOTION demo exercising the new math `easing` namespace (smoothstep/smootherstep, mapping Bevy EaseFunction / GLSL smoothstep), contrasting a linear cube with a smoothstep-eased cube over createApp's managed frame-loop + Time.elapsed.

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle downstream of engine-runtime sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: easing demo; fps no-regression covered by hello-cube / hello-room gates

bench.reason: easing demo; bench focus on engine-math / pixel-parity

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; Bevy easing_functions reproduction
